close_reason: Created examples/python-deps/ demonstrating third-party pattern. Full integration requires pip-to-buck tooling or manual vendoring.
description:
Create examples/python/hello-deps/ with an external package dependency.

Files needed:
- examples/python/hello-deps/__init__.py
- examples/python/hello-deps/__main__.py - uses external package (e.g., click, requests)
- examples/python/hello-deps/BUCK - python_binary with deps

Requires:
- Python deps cell with the external package
- pyproject.toml or requirements.txt

Should work with both native Python and buck2 run.
title: Python: hello with external package (deps example)
